name: Shelfmark
short_desc: Self-hosted book and audiobook search and download hub
author: calibrain
description: Shelfmark is a self-hosted web interface for discovering and downloading books and audiobooks from multiple sources. It aggregates web, torrent, usenet, and IRC sources into a unified search interface with metadata enrichment from Hardcover, Open Library, and Google Books. Supports multi-user request workflows, real-time download progress tracking, and integrations with Calibre, Calibre-Web, Grimmory, and Audiobookshelf.
